title: Kaiivoid
description: Simulate chunk unload for void trading, allowing to keep Paper optimizations. On Purpur/Kaiiju only.
body:
# Kaiivoid

Bring void trading back on [Purpur](https://github.com/PurpurMC/Purpur) / [Kaiiju](https://github.com/KaiijuMC/Kaiiju) servers without having to set `chunk-unloads: 0s` on Paper.  
Don't ruin Paper optimizations for an exploit.

## How to use

You have to use [Purpur](https://github.com/PurpurMC/Purpur) / [Kaiiju](https://github.com/KaiijuMC/Kaiiju) and enable `allow-void-trading` (Purpur) / disable `fix-void-trading` (Kaiiju).  
This plugin simulate chunk unloading near the villager.
